## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

List the automated and manual checks you ran.

## Security and governance

Describe any impact on authentication, credentials, private documents,
external services, publishing, or the mandatory human-review boundary. Write
`None` if not applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation updated where appropriate
- [ ] No credentials, private data, local state, or generated artifacts committed
- [ ] Backward compatibility and deployment impact considered
- [ ] Generated content still publishes only to a branch and pull request for human review
